title: hedyotis angulata
intro: Hedyotis angulata, also known as the Chinese waxflower or bu gu zhi, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular and immune system health. Hedyotis angulata can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
